successes date number pounds have lost, haven't weighed myself since December 14th.
most proud what have learned, most importantly proud what retaining using everyday, feeling much better!

MUCH MORE THAN DIET!
lifetime have started more diets than passing ships through Suez Canal!
Each every time joined Weight Watchers, Opti-Fast, Medi-Fast, countless other diets, always going final one.
diet always started with great amount determination willpower succeed, always seemed with feeling disgust disappointment.
sometimes able sustain weight lose, never able make lifestyle changes that allowed dieting dilemmas.
I'll never pish-pish diet that allows individuals realize weight lose healthy relationship with food, eluded years!
This past December contacted online registered dietician named Patty Berry.
done with numerous attempts starting learning about different techniques, seemed this might more educational experience learning how, what, when eat.
Well, little more than month passed, haven't weighed myself within this time frame, know that clicking areas discuss, have never felt confidence that feel today, that will never diet again!
This journey been enjoyable haven't felt this content quite long time.
Working with Patty experience.
Even though located Diego, touch base with every couple days after perused food records, have just completed second online visit with "safe HIPAA compliant platform" this morning.
There feelings working with her, there only support, suggestions, solutions healthy, balanced, satisfying meals snacks.
There foods that bad, there meals snacks eaten very lenient amounts.
laugh myself when some responses food records suggest eating enough, after further explanation, what suggests makes perfect sense.
there truth saying that you; "can't teach tricks" because putting that saying rest!
occasionally plan sharing progress while working with Patty Berry, sharing some life changing behaviors experiencing.

Last Wednesday woke news that were going with 'bomb cyclone' next day!
Really?
Surprisingly, never heard even though consider myself largest receptacles useless information.
Sean Patrick went beach there were signs ominous type weather come!
Nothing seemed amiss, been frigid beach showed signs weather!
Wednesday, 4:15 signs impending 'bomb cyclone', didn't know what 'bomb cyclone' was.
went home make sense storm come.
What learned that meteorologists coined this term, they used paper they published.
'bomb cyclone' powerful cyclones that their energy from rapid drops pressure caused cold temperatures colliding.
Similar having rheumatoid arthritis, when there drops pressure caused cold temperatures colliding, adversely react, layman's terms, world hurt.
patiently waited Armageddon come!
Thursday, 9:32 Sean Patrick ventured back down beach what shaking quickly apparent something
floating ice, apparent temperature increasing started snow!
Wednesday, 1:45 headed back down beach what shaking, didn't very far!
wind whipping snow around cold!
After waiting walkway shoveled, were able escape!
Making beach were with cyclonic weather!
visual display snow being whipped many directions challenged water slamming into shore.
quite sight, bitter cold sent fleeing comfort central heating.
Hoping everyone that affected this storm faired well, wishing great week!
